hero.title: Keeping infrastructure online, secure, and monitored.
hero.role: IT Support Technician → Network Security / SOC Analyst
hero.summary: IT professional with hands-on experience supporting users, servers, networks, Microsoft 365, CCTV systems and business operations across Saudi Arabia and Pakistan.

job1.title: IT Support Technician
job1.company: Hussam Group Trading Company — Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
job1.b1: Support employees and daily IT operations across multiple restaurant branches.
job1.b2: Manage Microsoft 365 services, user accounts, shared files and access permissions.
job1.b3: Maintain Hikvision and Dahua CCTV systems, remote access and video backups.
job1.b4: Administer BioTime attendance devices and prepare attendance reports for HR.

job2.title: IT & Cloud Specialist
job2.company: Matrix Software Company — Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
job2.b1: Supported Windows Server, VMware and business applications.
job2.b2: Worked with Active Directory, Group Policy, DNS, DHCP and TCP/IP services.
job2.b3: Assisted with backups, troubleshooting and system administration.
job2.b4: Used PowerShell and technical documentation for routine support work.

job3.title: IT Support Specialist
job3.company: Amjaad General Contracting — Jeddah, Saudi Arabia
job3.b1: Provided support for computers, printers, software and network issues.
job3.b2: Assisted with server monitoring, maintenance and security checks.
job3.b3: Troubleshot LAN, WAN and end-user connectivity problems.

job4.title: IT Assistant Manager
job4.b1: Delivered technical support for more than 100 staff members.
job4.b2: Supported switches, routers, firewalls and office network infrastructure.
job4.b3: Helped users follow security and data-protection best practices.
job4.b4: Assisted with disaster recovery planning and infrastructure improvements.
